notableEvents.label: Nick Loftin GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Loftin grounds into a double play, third baseman Josh Jung to second baseman Nicky Lopez to first baseman Jake Burger. Michael Massey out at 2nd. Nick Loftin out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Isbel reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Isbel reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Nicky Lopez.

notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas singles on a line drive to left fielder Alejandro Osuna. Michael Massey scores.

notableEvents.label: Jac Caglianone GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jac Caglianone grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Duran to first baseman Jake Burger. Salvador Perez out at 2nd. Jac Caglianone out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas flies out to left fielder Alejandro Osuna.
